decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_m14-ad-sbs, which is the combined M14 A/D SBS canonical record. The source text mentions 'M14 A and M14 D Select Bus Service (M14 A/D SBS)' as a combined entity. No different registry record exists to link to; the alias route_m14-a-sbs-winter2020 is already registered on route_m14-ad-sbs.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The 14th Street Transit & Truck Priority (TTP) Pilot Project was implemented by the New York City Department of Transportation (NYCDOT) in October 2019, aiming to improve operations of the M14 A and M14 D Select Bus Service (M14 A/D SBS).
